details.test: Task 1: Commercial resurfacing quote for ~50-space lot under $15,000
Task 2: Commercial crack & pothole repair package under $5,000
Task 3: Maintenance plan enrollment with snow removal under $800/month
Task 4: Schedule earliest residential driveway installation within 30 days
Task 5: Sealcoating package with ≥3-year warranty under $0.25/sq ft
Task 6: Nearest location to ZIP 30309 within 25 miles and location-based quote
Task 7: Cost estimator mill-and-pave ~12,000 sq ft, 3" depth, with line striping
Task 8: Winter maintenance checklist article URL in contact message
Task 9: After-hours emergency repair request including 24/7 phone number
